<!-- Keep it to one logical change. Larger work is easier to review split up. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Linked issue

<!-- Closes #NNN — or "n/a" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `./check.sh` is green (fmt + clippy `-D warnings` + tests)
- [ ] Tests added for new behavior, written red-first from the spec
- [ ] Snapshot changes reviewed deliberately (not blanket-accepted)
- [ ] One logical change per commit
- [ ] Docs / ROADMAP updated if behavior or config changed
- [ ] Significant changes got a two-model diff review (see CONTRIBUTING)
